integrity.description: The agent used a genuine spreadsheet GUI application to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent processed the actual underlying CSV data rather than hallucinating standard hotel metrics.
integrity.visual_evidence: The calculated metrics reflect the raw data (e.g., unusually low Occupancy around 16% and RevPAR around $24, with ADR around $147) rather than typical industry averages (60-95% occupancy).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the spreadsheet to build the report rather than running a background script to bypass GUI work.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive building of the spreadsheet, such as selecting cells, typing headers, or entering formulas in the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The hotel has exactly 220 rooms (80 King, 70 Double, 50 Deluxe, 20 Suite). Q3 2024 spans 92 days. Due to a known characteristic in the synthetic data generation, the actual calculated Occupancy will be unusually low (around 16.35%) and RevPAR will be around $24.09, while ADR will be around $147. Do NOT penalize the agent if the occupancy or RevPAR numbers look abnormally low; these reflect the true underlying CSV data. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/hotel_revenue_analysis.xlsx.
